projects.title: Multi-LLM Evaluation Framework for Healthcare Use Cases
projects.summary: Structured evaluation framework comparing Claude, Gemini, GPT, Antigravity, and Microsoft Copilot across the actual tasks a healthcare IT and security team faces. Pick the right model for the right task instead of defaulting to one vendor.

projects.title: Copilot Studio AI Agents for Security & Operations
projects.summary: Custom AI agents in Copilot Studio for service desk triage, security alert classification, QA automation, and policy lookup. Each agent operates under HIPAA-aligned governance: Purview DLP on prompts, Conditional Access on agent surfaces, full audit logging through Sentinel.

projects.title: 42 CFR Part 2 Compliance Program for SUD Records
projects.summary: Built and shipped the organization's 42 CFR Part 2 compliance program ahead of the February 2026 enforcement deadline. Covers SUD record confidentiality, consent management, segregation of regulated records, and breach notification obligations newly aligned with HITECH.

projects.title: Claude Code & MCP Workflow Integration for IT and Security
projects.summary: Integrated Claude Code into the daily IT and security workflow at Harbors. KQL detection rule authoring, runbook drafting, infrastructure-as-code review, and ad-hoc scripting handled through Claude Code with custom CLAUDE.md context and MCP servers wired to internal systems.

projects.title: Paperclip: Open-Source AI Company Emulator
projects.summary: Open-source multi-agent simulation that emulates how an AI-driven company operates. Different LLM-backed agents play roles like CEO, engineer, analyst, and operator. A research sandbox for AI safety, governance, and decision-making questions.

outcomes.label: Coordinated LLM Ecosystem
outcomes.context: Shared world state and turn scheduling

projects.title: Microsoft Purview DLP: Full Enterprise Deployment
projects.summary: Microsoft Purview DLP across every M365 workload: Teams, Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, and endpoint. PHI pattern detection blocks exfiltration at the edge while routing alerts into Sentinel for unified incident response. HITECH breach notification thresholds are monitored automatically.

projects.title: Microsoft Teams Rooms & IoT Device Governance
projects.summary: Microsoft Teams Rooms deployed across all facilities and the broader IoT estate brought under management. Intune enrolled, segmented onto a dedicated IoT VLAN, monitored through Sentinel. Shadow IoT eliminated.

projects.title: CIS Controls v8: Full Compliance Program from Zero
projects.summary: Built the organization's compliance program from nothing. A full CIS Controls v8 implementation across all 18 domains, crosswalked to the HIPAA Security Rule, audited at 100% pass, and architected for HITRUST CSF readiness.

projects.title: Dapper Fox Group: Concurrent Systems Administration
projects.summary: Concurrent systems administration role outside healthcare. Owned infrastructure, configuration, vendor relationships, and IT operations for a commercial client while continuing to deepen the security program at Harbors. A deliberate choice to keep sector breadth fresh.

projects.title: DMP Entré Access Control & Ubiquiti Camera Systems
projects.summary: Built enterprise physical security from zero. DMP Entré access control across all facilities and Ubiquiti UniFi camera coverage at every entry point. Physical and logical access events now flow into the same audit trail under unified identity.

projects.title: Website Overhaul: WordPress to Webflow
projects.summary: Replaced a decade-old WordPress site with a Webflow rebuild. Modern, responsive, and WCAG-compliant. Integrated with HubSpot CRM for newsletter and lead capture and Google Analytics for traffic visibility. Eliminated a long-standing security and maintenance liability.

projects.title: HubSpot CMS & Bereavement Program Digitization
projects.summary: Replaced the paper-based bereavement outreach program with a fully digital HubSpot deployment: CMS for resource pages, Marketing Hub for cadence, and CRM for the system of record. Automated enrollment, segmented journeys, and analytics across every touchpoint that previously generated zero data.

projects.title: Mosai & Mosai Circle: Intake and Order Management
projects.summary: Deployed Mosai (formerly Forcura) for clinical intake and order management across field and office staff, plus Mosai Circle for inter-organizational physician and facility eSignatures. Eliminated paper-based intake and accelerated order turnaround for every referring physician partner.

projects.title: Anti-Phishing & Anti-Impersonation Email Defense
projects.summary: Eliminated domain spoofing across all organization email by enforcing DMARC, DKIM, and SPF in concert with Defender for Office 365 anti-phishing and anti-impersonation policies. PHI exfiltration via mail is blocked at the gateway and reinforced by Purview DLP.

projects.title: Employee Onboarding Program from Scratch
projects.summary: Built the organization's first structured onboarding program. Fully automated endpoint provisioning via Autopilot, day-one security awareness training, and identity lifecycle management through Entra ID. New hires are productive and compliant before IT lifts a finger.

projects.title: Tenable Vulnerability Management Program
projects.summary: Stood up continuous vulnerability management with Tenable.io from zero. Scan-to-ticket workflow, severity-based remediation SLAs, and Sentinel integration for correlated risk scoring. Drove a 78% reduction in critical and high-severity findings within the first six months.

projects.title: Microsoft Sentinel: SIEM Build from Zero
projects.summary: Stood up the organization's first SIEM from absolute zero. Microsoft Sentinel with custom KQL detection rules, 12+ data connectors, and Logic Apps playbooks for automated response. Replaced isolated alerts with unified, correlated visibility.

projects.title: Autopilot & Intune: Full Endpoint Standardization
projects.summary: Standardized the entire device fleet on Microsoft Autopilot and Intune. New hardware ships zero-touch from the OEM. Existing devices are enrolled in Intune MDM for unified management and compliance reporting. Eliminated manual imaging and brought every endpoint under a single policy framework.

outcomes.label: Provisioning
outcomes.context: No IT intervention for new hardware

projects.title: Jira, JSM, Confluence & Trello: First ITSM Program
projects.summary: Stood up the organization's first formal ticketing and ITSM platform. Jira Service Management with service catalogs and SLAs, Jira for project work, Confluence for knowledge, Trello for lighter team workflows. ITIL-aligned without being ITIL-precious about it.

projects.title: Microsoft Intune Migration from MaaS360
projects.summary: Migrated the entire device fleet off MaaS360 onto Microsoft Intune in 90 days with zero downtime and 100% enrollment. Eliminated a redundant MDM license stack while bringing endpoint compliance under the same identity and Conditional Access controls as everything else.

projects.title: ADP Workforce Now: First HRIS from Nothing
projects.summary: Implemented the organization's first HRIS. ADP Workforce Now replaced paper HR files and manual payroll. Data migrated, benefits onboarded, time and attendance digitized, ACA compliance automated, and the system wired into Entra ID for identity lifecycle.

projects.title: Network Infrastructure Overhaul
projects.summary: Replaced unmanaged consumer-grade network gear with enterprise WatchGuard NGFW, Ubiquiti UniFi switching, and Aruba wireless across all facilities. Full VLAN segmentation for clinical, admin, guest, and IoT traffic with 802.1X authentication on the wire.

projects.title: Penetration Testing and Security Assessments for SMBs
projects.summary: Recurring penetration testing and security assessment engagements for commercial small and mid-sized businesses. Scoped external attack surface and internal post-compromise paths, delivered ranked findings with reproduction steps, and produced remediation roadmaps that operations teams could actually execute.

projects.title: Multi-Site Network Overhaul for Hospitality Group
projects.summary: Refreshed the network across a multi-property hospitality group running on aging consumer-grade gear. Cisco Meraki SD-WAN at the edge, Ubiquiti UniFi for switching and wireless, full guest and back-of-house VLAN separation, and a PCI-aware design for the POS environment.

outcomes.label: PCI Scope
outcomes.context: POS isolated from corporate and guest

projects.title: Retail POS Network Reliability Upgrade
projects.summary: Took a multi-store retail client from frequent POS-impacting outages to nine-nines uptime on the credit card processing path. Dual-WAN failover, application-aware routing, monitored every link, and built escalation runbooks the store managers could actually use.

projects.title: Server Consolidation and Hyper-V Virtualization
projects.summary: Consolidated a sprawl of nine aging physical servers down to a two-host Hyper-V cluster for a commercial client. Workloads migrated with P2V tooling, storage centralized on shared SAN, backups standardized on Veeam with off-site replication, and the recovery process tested rather than assumed.

projects.title: Greenfield IT Buildout for Creative Studio
projects.summary: Stood up a complete IT environment for a creative studio moving into a new space. Network, server, storage, identity, workstations, AV, and physical security from an empty room to a working studio in twelve weeks. No legacy debt to inherit, which was the point.
